data.reporter_only_notes:
No official NIFC data for this Incident exists. Name, acreage, and containment comes from the Oklahoma Department of Agriculture, Food & Forestry Fire Situation Report for March 16th - image of the data linked in the OK channel. However, this is outside their "coverage/protection" area and may conflict with the official data for this fire if/when it comes in.

Due to no other data being available at this time, I decided to name and update the statistics of this fire based on the above report. It can/should be adjusted when we receive official data for this incident. - ZP 03-16
